title: Payment Failure - Transaction Declined
description: Customer is unable to complete payment. The transaction keeps getting declined even after multiple attempts.

title: Slow Website Performance
description: Customer reports that the website is loading very slowly, especially during checkout.

title: Email Verification Not Working
description: Customer is not receiving verification emails after signing up.

title: Profile Update Error
description: Customer encounters an error when trying to update profile information.

title: Login Issues - Can't Access Account
description: Customer is unable to log in to their account. They've tried resetting their password multiple times but still cannot access it.

title: Search Function Not Responding
description: Customer cannot get any results when using the search feature.

title: App Crash on Launch
description: Customer reports that the mobile app crashes immediately after opening.

title: Delayed Notifications
description: Customer receives notifications much later than expected.

title: Data Sync Issue
description: Customer reports that data is not syncing properly across devices.

title: UI Misalignment on Dashboard
description: Customer sees broken layout and misaligned components on dashboard page.
